boundary.learned_model_role: rank candidates by learned structured features
boundary.verifier_role: typed channels decide accept/reject/abstain for both arms

claim: The learned-vs-exported candidate comparison scales from the v2.2 seed set to a deterministic 15-case benchmark surface while preserving typed verification authority.
known_limitations: Structured synthetic scaled cases, not broad natural-language evaluation.
Exported arm is a confidence-ordering baseline, not a fresh live TensionLM generation run.
No live TensionLM runtime is loaded.
The result measures proposal/ranking quality under typed verification on this shaped benchmark surface.
scope: Deterministic structured scaled comparison set generated inside this repo; no live TensionLM runtime and no additional model training.
